Australia's Agentic AI Experts

We research.
We partner.
We deliver.

We find the world's most valuable agentic AI companies, forge strategic partnerships, and deliver transformative outcomes for Australian businesses.

Meet Our Partners → Talk to Us

Agentic AI is rewriting the rules of business. We spend our days deep in the research — identifying the companies building autonomous AI that actually works. Then we partner with them to bring real, measurable outcomes to Australian enterprises.

Why Augentico

The edge your
business is missing.

01

Deep AI Research

We don't skim headlines. We live inside the agentic AI ecosystem — analysing architectures, testing platforms, and tracking what's actually delivering results globally.

02

Ruthless Vetting

Most AI companies are vapourware. We run technical deep-dives, compliance audits, and real-world stress tests. If it doesn't survive our process, it doesn't reach you.

03

Strategic Partnerships

We don't just recommend tools — we forge deep partnerships with the companies we believe in. That means better pricing, priority access, and tailored support for our clients.

04

Agentic-First Thinking

Chatbots are yesterday. We focus exclusively on autonomous AI that plans, decides, and executes — the technology that fundamentally changes how businesses operate.

05

Australian Context

Data sovereignty. Privacy Act. APRA. We understand the regulatory landscape and enterprise buying cycle that makes Australia unique — and we navigate it for you.

06

Outcomes, Not Demos

We measure success in business impact — cost reduction, efficiency gains, revenue growth. If a technology doesn't move the needle, we don't bring it to the table.

Vendor Partners

The companies we
stand behind.

Every vendor in our portfolio has survived our research process. We partner with the best agentic AI companies in the world and bring their capabilities to Australian businesses.

Featured Partner
Visit ChaosTrack →

AI-Powered Cybersecurity
Preparedness & Response

ChaosTrack is an autonomous cybersecurity platform that combines AI-driven attack simulations with real-time incident response. It's the difference between hoping you're ready for a breach — and knowing you are.

🔥

Simulate Real Attacks

AI-powered tabletop exercises simulate phishing, ransomware, account takeover, and more — testing your entire organisation asynchronously without disrupting operations.

⚡

Respond in Milliseconds

Autonomous incident response works 24/7 — detecting, analysing, and mitigating real threats at machine speed. Multi-agent AI triages incidents and remediates within minutes.

📊

Continuous Compliance

Comprehensive audit trails, automated reporting, and a continuous feedback loop between simulation and execution. Built for financial services, healthcare, and regulated industries.

🔗

Integrates With Your Stack

Native integrations with Jira, Slack, Microsoft SharePoint, CrowdStrike, and more. Drops into your existing security infrastructure without rip-and-replace.
